summary: Forum Enhancements testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All new features verified: voting (upvote/downvote with toggle), voter names visible, similar posts AJAX search, enhanced top contributors with reputation scores.
seed_data_creation: Test posts and votes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forum enhancements fully functional. Voting system works with toggle logic. Existing closed post 'How to calculate lot size?' (id: 4deb1f00-8f78-4f3f-bcb7-1f26122fa8f9) has 2 comments and Best Answer. Top contributor superadmin@test.com has 1 best answer, reputation=14.

upvote_downvote_buttons.details: Vote buttons visible on each comment with data-testid='upvote-{comment_id}' and 'downvote-{comment_id}'

vote_toggle_remove.details: Clicking same vote type removes the vote (toggle off)

vote_toggle_switch.details: Clicking different vote type switches from up to down or vice versa

cannot_vote_own_comment.details: Backend returns 400 with 'Cannot vote on your own comment' when user tries to vote on own comment

voter_names_visible.details: Clicking toggle-voters button expands dropdown showing voter names (not anonymous). Shows 'Upvoted' and 'Downvoted' sections

vote_score_displayed.details: Comments show '+N score' when score > 0 or negative when score < 0

similar_posts_ajax_search.details: In New Post dialog, typing 3+ chars in title triggers search. Shows similar posts with Solved/Open badges and comment count. 400ms debounce.

top_contributors_reputation.details: Top Contributors section shows: rank, name, best answers (star icon), upvotes received (thumbsup icon), comments count, reputation score

comment_vote_data_enrichment.details: GET /api/forum/posts/{id} returns comments with: upvotes, downvotes, score, up_voters, down_voters, my_vote

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/forum/comments/{id}/voters - Get voters list with names
GET /api/forum/posts/{id} - Comments enriched with vote data
ui_elements_verified: data-testid='similar-posts-suggestions' - Similar posts dropdown in New Post dialog
data-testid='top-contributors-section' - Top contributors card with reputation
